knowledge.title: Paywall selection modal
knowledge.summary: React modal used by the newsletter composer to choose paywall products.
knowledge.content: PaywallSelectionModal renders the newsletter paywall picker. It keeps selected product ids stable while editors move between composer steps. The component lives in src/components/paywall-selection-modal.tsx and owns the product selection UI for the paywall workflow.

knowledge.title: TS-999 PaywallSelectionModal fix
knowledge.summary: TS-999 was fixed by preserving selected product ids through the save transition.
knowledge.content: When TS-999 appears in PaywallSelectionModal, check the selected product ids reducer before changing the modal props. The previous fix kept ids stable across save and preview transitions in src/components/paywall-selection-modal.tsx.

knowledge.title: Current auth flow
knowledge.summary: Auth uses OAuth bearer tokens with refresh token rotation.
knowledge.content: The current auth flow uses OAuth bearer tokens. Login returns an access token and a rotating refresh token. Token refresh invalidates the previous refresh token and stores the replacement before returning to the client.

knowledge.title: Legacy auth flow
knowledge.summary: Outdated auth notes that mention session cookies.
knowledge.content: Legacy auth flow used server-side session cookies and did not rotate refresh tokens. This note is stale and should not be selected when the old knowledge id is rejected.

knowledge.title: Review reflection memories before saving
knowledge.summary: Reflection memories should be drafted and approved before becoming searchable.
knowledge.content: When an agent learns a new workflow, it should create a reflection draft and wait for review. Only approved reflection memories should be saved into searchable knowledge.

feedbackEvents.prompt: TS-999 PaywallSelectionModal selected product ids fix
feedbackEvents.reason: The prior bugfix was useful context for this error.
Legacy auth notes should not outrank current token rotation guidance.

cases.prompt: Update the React PaywallSelectionModal in src/components/paywall-selection-modal.tsx for the newsletter paywall flow.
Fix TS-999 in src/components/paywall-selection-modal.tsx around PaywallSelectionModal because selected product ids reset after save.
Which prior PaywallSelectionModal fix should guide TS-999 selected product id work?
Explain the current auth flow and token refresh behavior.
How should reflection memories be approved before becoming searchable?
